title: Enable Dracut FIPS Module
triage_reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires modification of the dracut configuration, which is not supported on preexisting systems. This involves adding a module to the dracut configuration, which requires human intervention to ensure correct setup.
triage_estimated_impact: filesystems affected; FIPS mode cannot be enabled on preexisting systems without human intervention; Incorrect configuration could lead to system boot issues

title: Enable FIPS Mode
triage_reason: Enabling FIPS mode on a preexisting system is not supported and requires booting the installer with specific kernel flags, which involves extensive validation and potential system-wide changes.
triage_estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; Permanent finding if FIPS mode is not enabled at installation; Potential system-wide changes required for enabling FIPS mode

title: Set kernel parameter 'crypto.fips_enabled' to 1
triage_reason: Enabling FIPS mode on a preexisting system is not supported, requiring system installation with specific kernel parameters.
triage_estimated_impact: filesystems affected; System running in non-FIPS mode; FIPS mode not enabled during installation
